differentials.name: epiploic appendagitis (< 5 cm in diameter [peripheral hyperdense rim]

context: omental torsion (rare) with swirling of vessels in omentum | absent / (rarely) mild thickening of adjacent bowel wall corresponding to site of focal | nonmobile noncompressible hyperechoic tender mass | mild uptake of 18F-fluorodeoxyglucose (FDG)
